title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at UPS India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at UPS India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at UPS India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Fleet Manager to strengthen our Amritsar-based team.

About UPS India:
UPS India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with UPS India!
